events.title: Stabilize CodeWiki refactor after partial DDD migration
events.summary: Begin stabilization-first architecture refactor plan after reviewing DDD proposal and current partial migration drift.

events.title: Stabilize CodeWiki refactor after partial DDD migration
events.summary: Reviewed architecture proposal and current repo state. Found partial DDD migration already present with mixed old/new folders, duplicate engine paths, dominant legacy imports, passing typecheck, and failing codewiki_state tool path in this session.
issues: codewiki_state failed with: Cannot use 'in' operator to search for 'type' in undefined
Partial migration has duplicated src/engine and src/infrastructure/engine modules
Application rebuild currently imports root mutation queue and node:path, so ports/lock boundary is incomplete
